title: Content Agency Market Scan — AI-Augmented Services for SMBs

findings.finding: The global content marketing industry is valued at $600B+ with SMB segment growing at 14% annually. AI-augmented agencies are a nascent but rapidly growing subsegment.
Direct competitors include Verblio, nDash, and ClearVoice. Most position as marketplaces connecting businesses to freelancers. Few offer the AI-augmented hybrid model.
Retainer packages range from $500/mo for basic blog content to $5000/mo for full-service content strategy. AI-augmented agencies price 20-40% below traditional agencies.
The gap between enterprise content teams and solo freelancers is underserved. Small businesses want agency-quality output at freelancer prices — AI augmentation makes this viable.

recommendations: Start with a $750/mo starter package (4 blog posts + social repurposing) to validate demand
Target B2B SaaS companies in the 5-50 employee range via LinkedIn outreach
Differentiate on turnaround speed (48-hour drafts) enabled by AI-first workflow
Build a portfolio of 3-5 case studies within first month using discounted pilot clients
